common.name: Name
header.title: API Documentation
header.service.label: Service
header.group.label: Group
header.version.label: Version
header.export.notConfigured: Export feature is not configured yet
header.export.failedRetry: Export failed, please try again later
env.switcher.heading: Environment
env.drawer.title: Environments
env.form.baseUrl.label: Base URL
env.form.baseUrl.help: Leave empty to use the current page origin (handy with a dev proxy)
env.variables.title: Variables
env.variables.hint.before: Reference variables in Base URL or headers as
env.variables.hint.after: always resolves to the active Base URL.
headers.button.label: Headers
headers.drawer.title: Global headers
headers.value.tooltip: Variables like {{tenantId}} or {{baseUrl}} are expanded against the active environment.
headers.legend.title: Merge order
headers.legend.body: Global → Service → Environment → Endpoint-defined headers. The most specific scope wins for the same header name (case-insensitive).
auth.button.label: Auth
auth.tooltip.unbound: Auth schemes: <<count>> configured, none bound to a service yet
auth.drawer.title: Auth schemes
auth.drawer.selectOrCreate: Pick or create an auth scheme
auth.drawer.deleteConfirm: Delete this scheme? Stored credentials will be removed too.
auth.form.type.label: Type
auth.form.desc.label: Description (optional)
auth.section.bindings.tooltip: Pick which services should auto-apply this scheme during Try-it-out
auth.bearer.token.label: Token
auth.basic.username.label: Username
auth.basic.password.label: Password
auth.apikey.in.label: Location
auth.apikey.name.label: Param name
auth.apikey.value.label: Param value
auth.oauth.tokenUrl.label: Token URL
auth.oauth.clientId.label: Client ID
auth.oauth.clientSecret.label: Client Secret
auth.oauth.scope.label: Scope (optional)
auth.oauth.cache.label: Access token cache
auth.oauth.cache.hint: The token endpoint is called and cached automatically on the first Try-it-out send.
auth.secret.savedHint: Saved in the local vault (<<ref>>…). Subsequent edits overwrite the same entry.
auth.bind.input: Enter a service URL or identifier
auth.bind.required: Please pick or enter a service identifier
settings.button.label: Settings
settings.drawer.title: Settings
settings.vault.enable.label: Enable encryption (AES-GCM + PBKDF2)
settings.vault.enable.help.on: All credentials are encrypted with a key derived from your master password and never leave the browser.
settings.vault.enable.help.off: Credentials are stored in localStorage as plaintext (default). Enable encryption on shared devices.
settings.vault.lockedHint: Vault is locked. Unlock from the top bar before changing the master password.
settings.vault.idleLock.label: Auto-lock when idle:
settings.vault.disabledToast: Encryption disabled — credentials are now stored as plaintext
settings.vault.disable.confirmContent.be: Disabling encryption will write all credentials back to localStorage as
settings.vault.disable.confirmContent.af: . Enter your current master password to confirm.
settings.tryout.proxy.label: CORS proxy URL (optional)
settings.tryout.proxy.help: Prepended to Try-it-out targets, e.g. https://proxy.example.com/?url=
settings.tryout.proxy.placeholder: Leave empty to skip the proxy
settings.tryout.timeout.label: Request timeout (ms)
settings.tryout.withCredentials.label: Send cookies on cross-origin requests (withCredentials)
settings.tryout.withCredentials.help: When on, Try-it-out cross-origin requests carry browser cookies. The target must respond with Access-Control-Allow-Credentials: true and a specific origin for this to work.
settings.data.lockedExportNote: Locked credentials will not be included in the export
settings.data.import.confirmTitle: Importing will overwrite all current settings
settings.data.import.confirmContent: Existing environments, headers, auth schemes, vault and settings will be replaced; encryption is reset to plaintext mode. Export the current config first as a backup.
settings.data.reset.confirmContent: This wipes all CSAP Apidoc data in the browser: environments, headers, auth schemes, vault and settings. This action cannot be undone.
mpModal.notice.set.title: Remember this master password
mpModal.notice.set.desc: The master password lives only in your browser memory; the CSAP team cannot recover it. Forgetting it means resetting all data.
mpModal.notice.change: All existing credentials will be re-encrypted with the new password.
mpModal.field.oldPwd.required: Please enter the current master password
mpModal.error.changeFailed: Old password is wrong, or the new password does not meet the requirements
vault.banner.message: Vault is locked — saved credentials cannot be read. Enter the master password to restore Try-it-out.
tryout.tab.body.noBody: This request does not send a body
tryout.sending.title: Sending…
tryout.sending.desc: Waiting for the target service. Click "Abort" to cancel.
tryout.failed.network: Common causes: CORS, target service down, HTTPS cert issues, or proxy interference.
tryout.failed.timeout: The request did not return within the timeout. Adjust the timeout or check the target service.
tryout.failed.config: Check the URL / method / body format.
tryout.failed.unknown: Unknown error — see the browser console for details.
tryout.body.binary.title: Binary response (<<contentType>>, <<bytes>> B)
tryout.body.binary.desc: Binary content cannot be shown directly in the browser. Use the browser DevTools network panel to download.
tryout.composer.warning.title: Some injected items were silently dropped
tryout.composer.warning.cookies: The auth scheme tried to set cookies (<<names>>), but browsers refuse to let JavaScript write the Cookie header on cross-origin requests. To carry cookies, use Authorization / API Key headers instead, or enable "Send cookies on cross-origin requests (withCredentials)" in Settings together with matching backend CORS configuration.
layout.error.docLoad: Failed to load API docs. Please check the network or API service.
layout.error.jsonFormat: JSON is malformed — please check the parameter format
layout.export.failedRetry: Export failed, please try again later
layout.params.title: Request parameters
layout.req.warn: Request finished, but HTTP status was <<status>>
layout.req.timeout: Request timed out, please try again later
layout.req.network: Network error, please check your connection
layout.req.failed: Request failed, please check the network or API service
layout.req.params.title: <<type>> request parameters
layout.empty.title: Pick an API to start exploring
layout.empty.subtitle: Select an endpoint from the left to see its parameters and response shape
cols.enum.title: Enum values:
cols.validation.label: Validation rule
cols.validation.codeTooltip: Error code: used by frontend error handling and i18n
cols.validation.priorityTooltip: Validation priority: <<level>> (lower number = higher priority, runs first)
ts.modal.title: TypeScript types
ts.modal.desc: TypeScript types generated from the API parameters; copy them straight into your frontend project.
ts.error.generate: Failed to generate TypeScript types — please check the API data structure
tryoutHistory.title: Request history
tryoutHistory.empty: No history yet. The last 50 Try-it-out requests are recorded here automatically.
tryoutHistory.clear.confirm: Clear all history? This cannot be undone.
tryoutSnapshots.title: Request snapshots
tryoutSnapshots.empty: No snapshots yet. Save the current request as a named snapshot to reload it later or export it to share with your team.
tryoutSnapshots.col.name: Name
tryoutSnapshots.save.emptyUrl: URL is empty — nothing to snapshot
tryoutSnapshots.save.modal.title: Save as named snapshot
tryoutSnapshots.rename.modal.title: Edit snapshot
tryoutSnapshots.clear.confirm: Clear all snapshots? This cannot be undone.
tryoutSnapshots.field.name: Name
